title: Codex Persistent Goals and Automatic Continuation
description: Operate a long Codex task with a persistent goal, checkpoints, and user control. Learners cumulatively produce a Codex persistent-goal operating playbook through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Set, view, edit, pause, resume, and clear a Codex persistent goal with the documented goal interface.
Keep long instructions in a referenced file while the goal remains concise.
Design automatic continuation around verified progress and safe terminal conditions.
